name: The Unity
description:
The Unity is a species of slug. a white translucent species of slug that initially are the size of a finger, but can grow to the size of a house cat. every slug inside of the unity is part of the hivemind.

they are all part of one hivemind...they use sound and touch to communicate....they emulate a humming noise that resonates inside of their bodies...it creates a harmonic melody that drives any organism that hears it into gradual insanity. any human/organism that comes in contact with them automatically becomes one with the hivemind. the hivemind is a swarm of voices and thoughts...every thought relates to these words. Eat. survive. breed. kill.
creator: Samsaradude
